creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kai Knoblich from comment #9)

Might be worth adding deskutils/growl-for-linux to TEST_DEPENDS and a comment saying that it needs to be started for tests to run. 

Also, If you can set/pass the config location to gntp via environment variable, ${TOUCH} an empty .gntp file into WRKSRC and pass the environment variable into the test command
